rules.name: SE_Order_Organization_AD_Org_ID
rules.description: Set defaults when organization changes (trigger: AD_Org_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Organization-dependent defaults (warehouse, price list) not auto-set

rules.name: SL_Order_DocType_C_DocTypeTarget_ID
rules.description: Auto-configure order based on document type selection (trigger: C_DocTypeTarget_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Document type sub-settings not applied automatically

rules.name: SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate_DateOrdered
rules.description: Propagate order date changes to order lines (trigger: DateOrdered)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Line dates would not sync with header date changes

rules.name: SL_Order_UpdateLinesDate_DatePromised
rules.description: Propagate promised date changes to order lines (trigger: DatePromised)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Line dates would not sync with header date changes

rules.name: SL_Order_PriceList_M_PriceList_ID
rules.description: Update currency and tax settings from price list (trigger: M_PriceList_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Currency mismatch and wrong tax settings after price list change

rules.name: SE_Order_BPartner_C_BPartner_ID
rules.description: Auto-fill address, contact, price list, payment terms from business partner (trigger: C_BPartner_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: User must manually set all partner-related fields

rules.name: SL_Charge_C_Charge_ID
rules.description: Set charge amount and tax when charge selected (trigger: C_Charge_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Charge lines would lack proper tax and amount

rules.name: SE_Order_BPartnerLocation_C_BPartner_Location_ID
rules.description: Update tax zone and delivery info from partner location (trigger: C_BPartner_Location_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Tax calculations may use wrong zone after location change

rules.name: SE_Order_Project_C_Project_ID
rules.description: Auto-fill project-related defaults (trigger: C_Project_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Project defaults not populated; minor for simplified UI

rules.name: SL_Order_Product_M_Product_ID
rules.description: Auto-fill UOM, price, tax, description when product selected (trigger: M_Product_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: User must manually set price, tax, UOM for every line

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_QtyOrdered
rules.description: Recalculate line amounts when quantity changes (trigger: QtyOrdered)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Line amounts would not update when quantity changes

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_PriceActual
rules.description: Recalculate line amounts when net unit price changes (trigger: PriceActual)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Line amounts would not update when price changes

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_PriceList
rules.description: Recalculate discount when list price changes (trigger: PriceList)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Discount percentage would not recalculate

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_C_Tax_ID
rules.description: Recalculate gross amounts when tax changes (trigger: C_Tax_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Gross amounts would be wrong after tax change

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_LineNetAmt
rules.description: Back-calculate price and discount from line net amount (trigger: LineNetAmt)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Editing line net amount would not update price/discount

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_Discount
rules.description: Recalculate price from discount percentage (trigger: Discount)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Discount changes would not affect unit price

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_Gross_Unit_Price
rules.description: Recalculate net price from gross price (trigger: Gross_Unit_Price)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Net price would not sync with gross price changes

rules.name: SL_Order_Charge_Tax_C_Charge_ID
rules.description: Set tax for charge lines (trigger: C_Charge_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Charge lines would have no tax set

rules.name: SL_Order_Tax_C_BPartner_Location_ID
rules.description: Recalculate tax when line partner address changes (trigger: C_BPartner_Location_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Tax zone not updated for line-level address changes

rules.name: OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_C_Aum
rules.description: Convert operative quantity to base UOM quantity when alternative UOM changes (trigger: C_Aum)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Base quantity would not update when UOM changes

rules.name: OperativeQuantity_To_BaseQuantity_Aumqty
rules.description: Convert operative quantity to base UOM quantity (trigger: Aumqty)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Base quantity would not update when operative qty changes

rules.name: SL_Order_Conversion_M_Product_Uom_Id
rules.description: Convert order UOM quantity (trigger: M_Product_Uom_Id) - legacy second UOM mechanism
rules.impactIfOmitted: Legacy dual-UOM not supported; replaced by AUM mechanism

rules.name: SL_Order_Conversion_QuantityOrder
rules.description: Convert order UOM quantity (trigger: QuantityOrder) - legacy second UOM mechanism
rules.impactIfOmitted: Legacy dual-UOM not supported; replaced by AUM mechanism

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_M_AttributeSetInstance_ID
rules.description: Recalculate amounts when attribute set instance changes (trigger: M_AttributeSetInstance_ID)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Attribute set is system-level field; no user interaction expected

rules.name: SL_Order_Amt_CANCELPRICEAD
rules.description: Recalculate amounts when cancel promotions toggled (trigger: CANCELPRICEAD)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Cancel promotions is system-level field; no user interaction expected

rules.name: Val_C_BPartner_Location_ShipTo
rules.description: Filter partner addresses to ShipTo locations for C_BPartner_Location_ID
rules.impactIfOmitted: Non-shipping addresses would appear in dropdown

rules.name: Val_C_BPartner_Location_BillTo
rules.description: Filter partner addresses to BillTo locations for BillTo_ID
rules.impactIfOmitted: Non-billing addresses would appear in dropdown

rules.name: Val_C_DocType_PO_SO
rules.description: Filter document types by PO/SO flag and return/quotation status
rules.impactIfOmitted: Wrong document types would appear (SO types in PO window)

rules.name: Val_M_PriceList_isSOTrx
rules.description: Filter price lists to purchase-only lists
rules.impactIfOmitted: Sales price lists would appear in purchase order

rules.name: Val_AD_User_BPartner_Contacts
rules.description: Filter user contacts by selected business partner
rules.impactIfOmitted: Contacts from other partners would appear

rules.name: Val_FIN_PaymentMethod_IsSOTrx
rules.description: Filter payment methods by payout capability for purchase orders
rules.impactIfOmitted: Payment methods without payout support would appear

rules.name: Val_C_Tax_IsSOTrx_Date
rules.description: Filter taxes by purchase type, validity date, and client
rules.impactIfOmitted: Invalid or expired taxes would appear in selector

rules.name: Val_C_Aum_UOM
rules.description: Filter alternative UOMs to those valid for the product and purchase direction
rules.impactIfOmitted: Invalid UOMs would appear in selector

rules.name: Val_C_Project_Status_BPartner
rules.description: Filter projects by open/order status; purchase orders allow any partner
rules.impactIfOmitted: Closed projects would appear in selector

rules.name: ReadOnly_Processed_Header
rules.description: Make header fields read-only when order is processed (@Processed@='Y')
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could attempt to edit processed orders

rules.name: ReadOnly_Processed_Lines
rules.description: Make line fields read-only when order is processed (@Processed@='Y')
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could attempt to edit lines on processed orders

rules.name: ReadOnly_Posted_Dimensions
rules.description: Make accounting dimension fields read-only when posted (@Posted@='Y')
rules.impactIfOmitted: Users could modify dimensions after posting

rules.name: ReadOnly_GrossPrice_NetFields
rules.description: Make net price fields read-only when price list includes tax (@GROSSPRICE@='Y')
rules.impactIfOmitted: Both net and gross fields editable simultaneously, causing conflicts

rules.name: ReadOnly_LineNetAmt_Edit
rules.description: Make line net amount read-only unless edit flag is set (@Iseditlinenetamt@='N')
rules.impactIfOmitted: Line net amount always editable, overriding calculated values

rules.name: Display_GrossPrice_Fields
rules.description: Show gross price fields only when price list includes tax (@GROSSPRICE@='Y')
rules.impactIfOmitted: Gross price fields shown when using net price lists

rules.name: Display_NetPrice_Fields
rules.description: Show net price fields only when price list excludes tax (@GROSSPRICE@='N')
rules.impactIfOmitted: Net price fields shown when using gross price lists

rules.name: Display_AlternateUOM_Fields
rules.description: Show operative qty and alternative UOM when no legacy second UOM (@M_Product_Uom_Id@='')
rules.impactIfOmitted: AUM fields always visible even when legacy UOM is set

rules.name: Display_AlternateTaxableAmount
rules.description: Show alternate taxable amount when tax uses alternate base (@UsesAlternate@='Y')
rules.impactIfOmitted: Alternate tax base field always visible

rules.name: Display_ACCT_DIMENSION
rules.description: Show accounting dimension fields based on config (@ACCT_DIMENSION_DISPLAY@)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Dimension fields always shown; minor visual impact

rules.name: Process_ProcessOrder
rules.description: Process Order (complete, void, close) - core document lifecycle action
rules.impactIfOmitted: Orders cannot be completed or voided

rules.name: Process_AddPayment
rules.description: Add Payment via OBUIAPP process handler
rules.impactIfOmitted: Cannot add payments directly from order

rules.name: Process_CopyFromOrders
rules.description: Copy lines from other orders via OBUIAPP process
rules.impactIfOmitted: Must create lines manually; advanced feature not needed in simplified UI

rules.name: Process_CreatePOLines
rules.description: Create PO lines from requisitions or other sources
rules.impactIfOmitted: Must create lines manually; advanced procurement feature

rules.name: Process_CopyLines
rules.description: Copy lines from historical orders (classic process)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Must create lines manually; replaced by simpler workflows

rules.name: Process_Explode
rules.description: Explode BOM product into component lines
rules.impactIfOmitted: BOM explosion not available; advanced manufacturing feature

rules.name: Process_ManagePrereservation
rules.description: Manage stock prereservation pick and edit
rules.impactIfOmitted: Stock prereservation not available in simplified UI

rules.name: Process_CalculatePromotions
rules.description: Calculate promotions and discounts (classic process)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Manual promotion calculation; promotions rarely used in PO

rules.name: Process_CancelAndReplace
rules.description: Cancel and replace sales order (OBUIAPP process)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Sales-specific feature, not applicable to purchase orders

rules.name: Process_Post
rules.description: Post to general ledger (OBUIAPP process)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Posting happens through standard accounting; not needed in simplified UI

rules.name: Process_UpdatePaymentPlan
rules.description: Update payment plan (classic process)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Payment plan updated automatically; manual update rarely needed

rules.name: AuxInput_GROSSPRICE
rules.description: Determine if price list includes tax (IsTaxIncluded from M_PriceList)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Cannot toggle between net and gross price display

rules.name: AuxInput_ORDERTYPE
rules.description: Determine document subtype from C_DocType (DOCSUBTYPESO)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Cannot distinguish between standard PO and other PO subtypes

rules.name: AuxInput_Processed
rules.description: Inherit processed status from parent order for read-only logic
rules.impactIfOmitted: Line fields would not become read-only when order is processed

rules.name: AuxInput_UsesAlternate
rules.description: Check if tax uses alternate base amount
rules.impactIfOmitted: Alternate taxable amount field display logic would not work

rules.name: AuxInput_DOCBASETYPE
rules.description: Determine document base type (POO for purchase orders)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Cannot distinguish PO from SO in shared table logic

rules.name: AuxInput_HASSECONDUOM
rules.description: Check if product has legacy second UOM
rules.impactIfOmitted: Legacy dual-UOM display logic; replaced by AUM mechanism

rules.name: AuxInput_isBOM
rules.description: Check if product is a BOM for explode button display
rules.impactIfOmitted: Explode process is omitted; BOM check not needed

rules.name: AuxInput_IsStocked
rules.description: Check if product is stocked for delivery qty display
rules.impactIfOmitted: Delivered quantity is system-level; not shown in simplified UI

rules.name: AuxInput_ATTRIBUTESET
rules.description: Get product attribute set for display logic
rules.impactIfOmitted: Attribute set instance is system-level in simplified UI

rules.name: AuxInput_showAddPayment
rules.description: Determine if Add Payment button should show (check if fully paid)
rules.impactIfOmitted: Add Payment button visibility logic would not work

rules.name: AuxInput_APRM_OrderIsPaid
rules.description: Check if order is fully paid for Add Payment button visibility
rules.impactIfOmitted: Add Payment button shown even when order is fully paid
